title: Snap-on: Good Near-Term And Long-Term Growth Prospects
text: Snap-on Incorporated is well positioned to benefit from favorable trends in the automotive repair industry, driving revenue growth in the near and long term. The company's revenue growth prospects remain healthy, supported by the rising average age of vehicles and increasing complexity of vehicles. Snap-on's margin should benefit from operating leverage, easing capacity constraints, and its Rapid Continuous Improvement initiatives, leading to improved profitability.
